data.title: TTW Reveals Top 100 Convention Centers in the World for 2026
data.description: The latest report from Travel And Tour World (TTW) unveils the rankings of top venues worldwide for Meetings, Incentives, Conferences, and Exhibitions (MICE) that play a significant role in promoting trade, innovation, and business tourism on a global scale. The report, titled "TTW Reveals Top," was released on April 5, 2026, in New York. This comprehensive research provides insights into the key locations driving the MICE industry, catering to a growing number of events and conventions around the world.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Loom As Trump Says Iran Faces 'Hell' If No Deal; Sandisk Leads 7 Stocks To Watch
data.description: The President issued a warning of massive strikes on Tuesday, declaring that Iran could face severe consequences if the Strait of Hormuz remains closed. Currently, efforts are being made to boost market activity despite uncertainties. Keep an eye out for the most recent developments. Dow Jones Futures are on the horizon following President Trump's remarks about Iran potentially enduring harsh retaliation if a resolution is not reached. Additionally, Sandisk is among the seven stocks being closely monitored. This information was reported by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Antier Introduces In-Wallet Equity Perpetual Trading & Swaps for Unified Market Access
data.description: On April 6, 2026, Antier revealed a significant update to its crypto wallet services by incorporating in-wallet equity perpetual trading and swap features. This enhancement aims to provide a cohesive and efficient trading experience for users in the realm of digital finance.

data.title: Chances of US targeting Iran in 2022 now at 63% post Trump's statement, amid conflicting war signals.
data.description: The leader of the United States is sending conflicting messages regarding the war, indicating both an increase in conflict and a potential resolution within a matter of weeks.

data.title: BIELAT SANTORE & COMPANY ANNOUNCES SALE OF LANDMARK "OFFICE LOUNGE"
data.description: A renowned hospitality real estate firm in New Jersey, Bielat Santore & Company, recently disclosed the successful transaction involving the sale of The Office Lounge. This iconic restaurant and bar, situated at 820 Main Street in Toms River, has been a fixture in the community for over fifty years. The sale marks a significant milestone in the establishment's history, reflecting its enduring popularity and appeal to patrons.

data.title: Token oversupply undermines value growth - Blockworks' Michael Ippolito warns, with rising concerns on crypto sustainability.
data.description: Michael Ippolito from Blockworks has noticed a significant increase in token supply, which is causing returns to be diluted. This increase is breaking the connection between the fundamentals of cryptocurrencies and their prices. He has raised concerns about the long-term sustainability of the crypto model due to this surge in token supply.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Loom As Trump Sees Iran Deal Or 'Hell'; Sandisk Leads 7 Stocks To Watch
data.description: The President issued a strong warning, stating that Iran will face severe consequences if the Strait of Hormuz remains closed, with the possibility of major attacks. As a result, there is anticipation of a potential market uptick. Amidst this situation, investors should keep an eye out for key indicators. In related news, Dow Jones Futures are showing early signs of activity as Trump's stance on Iran influences market sentiment. Sandisk is among the leading stocks to watch during this period of heightened tensions.

data.title: Bitcoin & USD share a 'symbiotic' connection, as per BPI exec. Demand for both strengthens, contrary to belief, said Sam Lyman to Cointelegraph.
data.description: Sam Lyman informed Cointelegraph that the demand for one currency boosts the value of both in a mutually beneficial dynamic, which goes against common belief.

data.title: Michael Saylor Says 'Bitcoin Has Won'
data.description: Executive Chairman of Strategy, Michael Saylor, stated that the traditional four-year cycle of Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) price action is no longer relevant, with money flow from banks and digital credit now being the key determinant. Strategy's Bitcoin strategy has shifted towards Stretch (STRC) funding over stock issuance, reflecting Saylor's emphasis on the importance of capital flows. Saylor cautioned against misguided alterations to the Bitcoin protocol in a recent post, affirming Bitcoin's established status as digital capital linked to the expansion of credit creation and banking infrastructure. The market has embraced Bitcoin as digital capital, rendering the old price cycle obsolete. Capital flows, driven by bank and digital credit, now dictate Bitcoin's price movement.

data.title: PureHealth Research Highlights Premium Supplements for Liver Health to Promote Daily Vitality
data.description: PureHealth Research, based in Manassas, Virginia, recently showcased its range of supplements for liver health on April 5, 2026. The company is renowned for its evidence-based nutritional products tailored to meet the needs of individuals facing the challenges of contemporary diets and daily environmental factors. The supplements aim to support liver health amidst the increasing pressures of modern lifestyles.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Threatens 'Hell' If Iran Doesn't Open Hormuz; Sandisk Leads 7 Stocks To Watch
data.description: The President issued a warning of significant retaliatory actions on Tuesday, stating that Iran would face severe consequences if the Strait of Hormuz remains closed. This threat was made amidst ongoing tensions between the two nations. As a result, there is anticipation of a possible market rally. Investors are advised to monitor for further developments. Additionally, attention should be given to Sandisk and six other stocks, as they are expected to be in focus. This information is part of a recent report from a financial publication.

data.title: Token oversupply causing 'existential problem' as value creation lags behind, warns Michael Ippolito. Concerns raised about crypto's sustainability.
data.description: Michael Ippolito from Blockworks has observed a significant increase in token supply, which is diluting returns and causing a disconnect between fundamentals and price in the crypto market. This surge in token supply is raising concerns about the long-term sustainability of the cryptocurrency model.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Trump Threatens Iran With 'Hell' If Hormuz Isn't Open; Sandisk Leads 7 Stocks To Watch
data.description: On Tuesday, President Trump issued a stark warning, threatening significant attacks if the Strait of Hormuz remains closed. He stated that Iran will face severe consequences and be "in hell" if the situation persists. Following this alarming statement, there is a current effort to rally the market. Investors are advised to keep an eye out for a specific signal indicating the market's response to this development. Furthermore, among the top stocks to watch amidst this news is Sandisk, leading a group of seven notable companies. The situation is evolving rapidly, with implications for both geopolitical tensions and the financial markets.

data.title: DFRobot Showcases AI Maker Projects at Robot Hokoten in Akihabara
data.description: DFRobot, a renowned global player in open-source hardware, took part in the Robot Hokoten @ Akihabara event in Tokyo. The event was held on April 5, 2026. DFRobot showcased two innovative AI-driven projects at the DigiKey booth. These projects were developed using open-source hardware. One of the projects was an "Electronic Nose," highlighting the company's commitment to cutting-edge technology and innovation.

data.title: Weekend Round-Up: Coinbase's Trust Company Nod, Quantum Threat To Bitcoin And More
data.description: In the latest developments in the finance and tech sectors, Coinbase Global Inc. made headlines by obtaining conditional approval to function as a national trust company. The Office of the Comptroller of the Currency granted this approval, allowing the company to establish itself as a federally chartered national trust entity. It is important to note that Coinbase is not shifting towards becoming a commercial bank, hence it will not accept retail deposits or partake in fractional reserve banking. This move is aimed at promoting federal regulatory consistency. This news, among many others such as the potential quantum threat to Bitcoin and ongoing discussions on financial inclusivity, dominated the headlines this week.

data.title: Popular author advises investing in Bitcoin, gold and silver as 1974-style financial shift repeats. #RobertKiyosaki #cryptocurrency #gold #silver
data.description: The renowned author of the bestseller "Rich Dad Poor Dad" remains a strong advocate for alternative forms of currency, such as Bitcoin, gold, and silver. He emphasizes the value of diversifying one's investments, highlighting these assets as viable options. His unwavering support for these alternative currencies underscores a growing trend towards seeking financial security outside traditional monetary systems.

data.title: The 93rd CMEF is set to open in Shanghai, as the world's largest medical device industry exhibition spotlights AI, robotics, and international cooperation
data.description: The 93rd edition of the China International Medical Equipment Fair (CMEF) is scheduled to take place from April 9 to 12, 2026, at the National Exhibition and Convention Center (NECC) in Shanghai. This annual event serves as the world's biggest medical device industry chain exhibition and attracts a large number of participants from across the globe.

data.title: AAVE price aims for $96 by April mid; tests critical support at $90.43. Short-term target $96.57, medium-term $87-$105.
data.description: Summary of AAVE Price Prediction: The short-term target for AAVE is $96.57 within 1 week. The medium-term forecast for the next month places AAVE in the range of $87 to $105. The bullish breakout level is set at $96.57, and the critical support level stands at $90.43.

data.title: LDO price expected to hit $0.35 by May 2026. Currently trading at $0.31, with key support at $0.30. Momentum signals bearish.
data.description: The current trading price of LDO is $0.31, accompanied by a neutral RSI and bearish MACD momentum. Based on technical analysis, there is a possibility of the price increasing to $0.35 if it breaks resistance, while maintaining critical support at $0.30.

data.title: Hedera's HBAR aims to break $0.10 resistance by mid-April 2026, currently at $0.09 with 37.16 RSI. Potential $0.10 target indicated by technical analysis, but bearish MACD warns of downside risks to $0.08 support.
data.description: The current price of HBAR is at $0.09 with a Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 37.16, indicating neutral momentum. Technical analysis indicates a possible target of $0.10 if resistance is successfully broken. However, the bearish Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) signals potential downward risks, with a support level at $0.08.
